tasks.label: run-once-with-log
args: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; Set-Location '${workspaceFolder}/dotnet-app/MonPlatPrenos.Worker'; if (!(Test-Path output)) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path output | Out-Null }; $log='output/run-once-' + (Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd-HHmmss') + '.log'; Write-Host "Writing console output to $log"; dotnet run -- --run-once 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath $log
